text: Being here, on the precipice of a thoughtfully designed space focused on research and development, I sense a quiet excitement. The glass walls invite curiosity but also create a feeling of separation, of thresholds between one reality and another, between knowledge and the quest for it. The signs and equipment remind me of the contingencies of life—preparedness, innovation, and the constant interplay of caution and discovery. I feel at once safe, curious, and poised for deeper contemplation.
